name: Stalwart
compose:
name: slashnode-stalwart
services:
  server:
    image: stalwartlabs/stalwart:v0.16.11
    container_name: stalwart
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      STALWART_RECOVERY_ADMIN: admin:${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      STALWART_PUBLIC_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8745
    volumes:
      - server_data-etc:/etc/stalwart
      - server_data-server:/var/lib/stalwart
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8745:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-etc:
    name: slashnode-stalwart_server_data-etc
  server_data-server:
    name: slashnode-stalwart_server_data-server
